chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ ابْنَ آدَمَ أَجْوَفُ لَا بُدَّ لَهُ مِنَ الطَّعَامِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 41 – The son of Adamas is hollow, there is no escape for him from the food

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/98)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/98)
text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ خَلَقَ ابْنَ آدَمَ أَجْوَفَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Created the son of Adam<sup>as</sup> as hollow’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hisham from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has created the child of Adam hollow.’”
